headline: This Utility Could Be the Next Dividend Aristocrat. It May Return 10% This Year.
summary: Southern Co. is nearing eligibility for the Dividend Aristocrats index, and steady earnings growth plus a 3% yield could drive solid returns.

headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

raw.headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
raw.summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

headline: Co-op Group and Southern Co-op propose merger to form enlarged society
summary: If the proposal proceeds, around 300,000 Southern Co-op members would join the Co-op Group’s existing membership base of approximately seven million.

headline: The Southern Company (SO) – Among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends
summary: The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is one of the largest producers of electricity in the United States and the largest wholesale provider in the Southeast. Together with its subsidiaries, the company delivers clean, safe, reliable, and affordable energy to its 9 million […]
